Why invite 15+5 year bids in the first place?

East Bengal vs Mohammedan Sporting during the ongoing ISL season. (Image: AIFF)

Former AIFF General Secretary Shaji Prabhakaran has advocated for a smaller commercial rights window. (Image: X)

NEW DELHI: London-based Genius Sports has bid Rs 64.39 crore per year, or approximately Rs 2,129 crore over 20 years, for the commercial rights of the Indian Super League (ISL) and Federation Cup . FanCode's bid for the same properties stands at roughly half of that: Rs 36 crore for the first year, or Rs 1,190 crore over 20 years. These are the two options in front of the All India Football Federation (AIFF) and the 14 ISL clubs after the tender bids were opened on Friday (March 27).Both stakeholders in Indian football are at different ends over the two bids. Because of the structure of the two bids, the ISL clubs feel FanCode is a better deal, while the AIFF, which is running the league and had invited the bids, finds the Genius Sports offer to be more favourable.The difference lies in the details of how the commercial rights pool will be allocated between AIFF, clubs and the eventual winner of the tender.Under the revenue sharing model proposed in the tender, AIFF will take home a fixed 20 per cent of the amount that the bidder puts in. Thereafter, at the end of the season, 70 per cent of the net revenue will be shared with the AIFF and rest will go to the commercial partner. Of that 70 per cent that AIFF received, 60 per cent will go to the clubs involved.It must also be taken into account that in the case of net losses, they get transferred to the next year. So, the challenge gets compounded for the second year as the challenge of breaking even, let alone making profit, becomes even higher.On the face of it, Genius Sports is the bigger bid and helps the cash-strapped football body. They make money regardless of what happens at the end of a season. However, with the sports tech company putting in Rs 64.39 crore each year, the challenge of bringing that back and more will be higher. In that scenario, clubs will get smaller, if any, share of funds.Clubs and the Dream11-owned company both are targeting a long-term approach and a feasible financial structure. Because FanCode will put in Rs 36-plus crore every year, the chances of breaking even and making profit are higher. In that scenario, clubs have the chances of making money although it means AIFF's direct and immediate share is smaller.Rs 36 crore5 per centRs 1,190 crore (approximately)Rs 7.2 crore (20 percent)Rs 238 crore (approximately)Rs 64.39 crore5 per centRs 2,129 crore (approximately)Rs 12.87 crore (20 per cent)Rs 425.80 crore (approximately)In most sports, or even with most brand associations, short term deals are preferred over long term associations. CEAT Tyres has been linked with the Indian Premier League (IPL) since 2015, having first come on as 'strategic timeout' sponsor for three seasons at a reported Rs 12-15 crore. In 2018, the contract was renewed for five seasons. And by 2024, when it was renewed again, the valuation was at Rs 240 crore for five years or Rs 48 crore a year -- a four-time increase in nine years.Returning to Indian football, AIFF are selling rights to their properties for 15-20 years at prevailing rates when the market is not favourable to the sport's future, considering we're admist a truncated season that got underway five months late.Former AIFF General Secretary Shaji Prabhakaran made the same arguement on social media. "Indian football deserves a more favorable [sic] commercial roadmap. This 15-20 year deal will make football suffer," he wrote on X."The current bids don’t offer the sustainability needed for AIFF or its clubs."AIFF must avoid long-term traps, limiting partnerships to 2-3 years is essential while the market undervalued (current market for football in India)."Let’s build an ecosystem that actually guarantees revenue distribution where it’s needed most: the clubs," he continued.Now, the onus is on the ISL clubs, which have been bleeding money already, to discuss and share their views with the AIFF on what the roadmap for the next two decades of Indian football will be. This enormous decision could be taken as early as Sunday when the AIFF Executive Committee are presented with the bid evaluation report.
Article Summary: London-based Genius Sports has bid Rs 64.39 crore per year for the commercial rights of the Indian Super League (ISL) and Federation Cup. FanCode's bid for the same properties stands at roughly half of that: Rs 36 crore for the first year, or Rs 1,190 crore over 20 years. AIFF will take home a fixed 20 per cent of the amount that the bidder puts in.

Article Title: NFL trade rumors: Washington Commanders eye reunion for Jayden Daniels with $120 million All-Pro wide receiver
Article Text:
washington commanders linked to bold move bringing $120 million All-Pro receiver for Jayden Daniels (Getty Images)

A Brandon Aiyuk reunion could solve Washington’s biggest offensive need



Brandon Aiyuk (Getty Images)

The Washington Commanders still have a clear gap in their offense, and it sits opposite Terry McLaurin. With only picks No. 7 and 71 across the first four rounds, the franchise faces a tricky draft board where premium receiver talent may not fall their way. Several top prospects could be gone before Washington is on the clock, leaving the front office to weigh positional value against immediate need. That reality has quietly shifted attention toward the veteran market, where a more proven solution could be waiting.The idea of pairing Brandon Aiyuk with McLaurin is gaining traction for a reason. Washington needs more than depth. It needs reliability, timing, and a second target who can consistently win matchups. Moe Moton of Bleacher Report put it plainly: "The Washington Commanders are the most logical match for Aiyuk, who played with Jayden Daniels at Arizona State in 2019. … Daniels and Aiyuk can rekindle their rapport at a time when the Commanders need a reliable playmaker to complement two-time Pro Bowler Terry McLaurin."That connection with Jayden Daniels is not just a footnote. It matters. Chemistry is hard to build in this league, and Washington is trying to accelerate a rebuild without wasting time on guesswork. Aiyuk, when healthy, brings polish and route discipline that young receivers often take years to develop. Moton added: "With a former teammate and an upstanding veteran [in McLaurin] who plays his position on the Commanders roster, Aiyuk would have the support and structure around him to be a productive, premier receiver in Washington.There is risk, of course. Aiyuk’s recent knee injury and his complicated exit from the San Francisco 49ers cannot be ignored. He did not play last season, and durability will follow him into any negotiation. Still, the upside remains hard to overlook. This is a player who earned All-Pro honors not long ago and has already shown he can operate at a high level in a structured offense. Aiyuk inked a four-year extension worth a total of $120 million in August 2024.Financially, the situation is just as telling. As ESPN’s Nick Wagoner explained: "Keeping Aiyuk seems far-fetched for multiple reasons, not the least of which is financial. Aiyuk’s base salary of $1.215 million in 2026 is a relative bargain, but he’s still due a $24.935 million option bonus Sept. 1 that if exercised will be prorated through 2030 if he remains on the roster." He added:"That bonus is no longer guaranteed because the Niners voided his remaining guarantees last July after Aiyuk failed to participate in mandatory rehab sessions for his injured right knee. … For Aiyuk, the more likely outcome remains the Niners moving on whether it’s via release or trade."If that happens, the market could tilt in Washington’s favor. A one-year deal in the $12 million range feels realistic, and for a team searching for immediate impact, that is a calculated gamble worth considering.
Article Summary: Brandon Aiyuk played with Jayden Daniels at Arizona State in 2019. The Washington Commanders have only picks No. 7 and 71 across the first four rounds. The franchise faces a tricky draft board where premium receiver talent may not fall their way.

Article Title: Taylor Swift reaches stunning new milestone with latest single while Travis Kelce wedding chatter fuels global excitement
Article Text:
Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce (Getty Images)

Taylor Swift breaks new ground with latest single while Travis Kelce wedding plans spark widespread buzz

The conversation around Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce continues to build, but not much is being confirmed publicly. With speculation pointing toward a June 13 ceremony near her Rhode Island home, the couple appears determined to keep details tightly controlled. That approach tracks. For two of the most recognizable figures in entertainment and sport, privacy is less a luxury and more a necessity. Still, while the wedding plans stay under wraps, Swift’s music remains very much in the spotlight, and it is driving the current wave of attention.Taylor Swift’s latest album, The Life of a Showgirl, has continued to deliver results months after its October 2025 release. Her third single, Elizabeth Taylor, arrived on March 10 and quickly found its footing. After debuting at No. 30 on the Pop Airplay chart, the track has now added another marker, climbing to No. 1 on the U.S. Apple Music music video chart. It is a fast rise, even by Swift’s standards, and another reminder of how reliably she converts attention into results.ID@undefinedCaption not available.ID@undefinedCaption not available.There is intent behind that success. “I wanted melodies that were so infectious that you were almost angry at it and lyrics that are just as vivid, but crisp and focused and completely intentional,” Swift said of the songwriting on “The Life of a Showgirl” during her appearance on the “New Heights” podcast in August of 2025.The clarity in that approach shows up in the final product. The track feels built for replay, but it also carries a visual identity that adds weight.The music video leans into that idea. It pulls from the legacy of Elizabeth Taylor, weaving in references to films like Cat on a Hot Tin Roof, Cleopatra and Who’s Afraid of Virginia Woolf?. Released to mark the close of Women’s History Month, the video blends homage with Swift’s own perspective. It is not just aesthetic. It is personal. “She is always someone that I’ve looked up to as being this very glamorous, very beloved, but for some reason a polarizing figure, which I found myself in that place, too. ”That balance between control and openness mirrors what is happening off stage. Kelce, speaking on The Pat McAfee Show, confirmed the couple plans to get married “before training camp.” With the Kansas City Chiefs typically reporting in mid to late July, the timeline quietly aligns with the rumored June window. No venue. No official date. Just enough to keep the conversation moving without giving anything away.Swift does not need to say more right now. The numbers, and the timing, are already doing that for her.
Article Summary: Taylor Swift’s latest album, The Life of a Showgirl, has continued to deliver results months after its release. Her third single, Elizabeth Taylor, arrived on March 10 and quickly found its footing. After debuting at No. 30 on the Pop Airplay chart, the track has now added another marker, climbing to No. 1.

Article Title: Brittany Mahomes makes headlines with Hall of Fame induction as Erin Andrews celebrates achievement
Article Text:
Erin Andrews and Brittany Mahomes (Getty Images)

Brittany Mahomes’ Hall of Fame moment reflects her record-setting UT Tyler career

Brittany Mahomes has long been a familiar face on NFL sidelines, but her latest honor brings the focus back to where her story in sports truly began. Before becoming widely known as the wife of Patrick Mahomes , she carved out a serious reputation of her own on the soccer field. That chapter came full circle this weekend when Brittany Mahomes was inducted into the University of Texas at Tyler Athletics Hall of Fame, a moment that resonated far beyond her college campus.From 2013 to 2016, Brittany Mahomes was a constant attacking threat for UT Tyler, building one of the most productive careers the program has seen. She finished second in school history with 31 goals and 78 total points, numbers that only tell part of the story. In a single season, she rewrote the scoring record book and became the first player in program history to record three hat-tricks in one campaign. Those performances turned her into a cornerstone of the Patriots’ attack and a name that still carries weight within the program.ID@undefinedCaption not available.ID@undefinedCaption not available.Her induction into the Hall of Fame feels less like a surprise and more like a recognition that was always coming.On Saturday, that recognition became official as her name was permanently etched into the school’s history.Mahomes shared the moment with her followers on Instagram, offering a glimpse into what the honor meant on a personal level. “Truly honored to be inducted into the UT Tyler Athletics Hall of Fame! This City and this School is a huge part of who I am today, I will forever cherish this honor and am forever grateful for what this program did for me as an athlete and as a person! Coach Webb, you brought out the best in me, this doesn't happen without you!”The response was immediate and warm. Among those celebrating was Erin Andrews , who kept it simple with, “Congrats girl!!!!!” The message reflected a friendship that has grown over the years, especially through Andrews’ WEAR apparel line, where Mahomes has often appeared as a visible supporter.That connection speaks to how Mahomes has balanced different roles over time. While many know her through her NFL ties, her athletic roots remain a defining part of her identity. This Hall of Fame nod does not just honor past performances. It reminds people that long before the spotlight of professional football, she had already built something meaningful on her own terms.
Article Summary: Brittany Mahomes was inducted into the University of Texas at Tyler Athletics Hall of Fame. Mahomes is the wife of New England Patriots quarterback Patrick Mahomes. She was a record-setting soccer player at the school. Erin Andrews congratulated Mahomes on Instagram.

Article Title: NFL Trade Rumors: Chicago Bears linked to shocking trade involving $20M key defensive leader
Article Text:
The Chicago Bears are being urged to trade T. J. Edwards ahead of the 2026 NFL Draft to save cap space and reshape their defense. While the move could create financial flexibility and add younger talent, it risks losing a key leader, making it a difficult but strategic decision.

Why trading TJ Edwards could make sense for Chicago



The Chicago Bears are coming off a season that changed expectations fast. An 11-6 record, a division title, and a playoff push gave fans a reason to believe again. But success often brings tough decisions. With the 2026 NFL Draft approaching, Chicago’s front office is now facing one of its most uncomfortable questions yet. Do they move on from a respected defensive leader to reshape the roster?It is not just about performance. It is about direction. Head coach Ben Johnson has already started building a new identity, and that includes reshaping the defense. The pieces are shifting. Contracts matter. Cap space matters more. And sometimes, even fan favorites get pulled into the conversation.Linebacker T. J. Edwards has been a steady presence, both on the field and inside the locker room. Still, analysts believe the Bears should explore a trade, not because of what he lacks as a player, but because of what the team needs moving forward.As one proposal explains, “With that said, they could trade him and save $6.2 million against the cap. Trading him with a post-June 1st designation would save closer to $8 million.They wouldn’t get much (at all, actually), but a deal in the vein of a late-round pick swap would make a lot of sense to get his contract off the books and allow them to get under the cap to sign their rookie class.“This year’s draft class would provide Chicago with a unique opportunity to replace him with someone who would be a much better fit for the style of defense they want to have. There are a lot of fast and physical ‘backers who will hear their name called on day two.”The logic is clear. Chicago wants speed. They want flexibility. And they want younger players who can grow within this system. Edwards, coming off a serious leg injury, may not fully match that vision anymore.There is also a financial reality. Releasing him would hurt more than help due to a heavy dead cap hit. Trading him is the only path that creates real savings. That makes the decision less emotional and more strategic.Still, it is not an easy call. Moving Edwards means losing leadership and experience, two things young defenses often struggle without. The Bears must weigh that loss against the chance to reset their roster.In the end, this is not just about one player. It is about choosing a direction. And Chicago appears ready to make bold moves to get there.
Article Summary: The Chicago Bears are being urged to trade T. J. Edwards ahead of the 2026 NFL Draft. The move could create financial flexibility and add younger talent, but it risks losing a key leader. The Bears must weigh that loss against the chance to reset their roster.

Article Title: Travis Kelce’s “chill” bachelor party sparks debate ahead of wedding with Taylor Swift
Article Text:
Travis Kelce is reportedly planning a relaxed bachelor party in the Bahamas with close friends, including Jason Kelce and Patrick Mahomes. Meanwhile, Taylor Swift continues celebrating their engagement publicly, sharing heartfelt moments. The couple is keeping things simple, focusing on meaningful experiences as their wedding approaches.

A Bahamas trip, golf, and good company define Travis Kelce’s pre-wedding plans

Something about Travis Kelce slowing things down right before his wedding just feels right. Instead of going all out, the Chiefs star is reportedly keeping his bachelor party simple. Think sunshine, close friends, and zero chaos. It is a softer, more personal approach, and honestly, it says a lot about where he is in life right now.Meanwhile, Taylor Swift is embracing this chapter in her own way. Every public moment lately has felt intentional, warm, and a little more grounded. Together, they are not just planning a wedding. They are shaping a story that feels real, even under the spotlight.Kelce is reportedly heading to the Bahamas this May for his bachelor party, and the vibe could not be more relaxed. Instead of loud parties, the plan is to rent a “huge” villa, unwind, and spend time golfing with his inner circle. His brother Jason Kelce and teammate Patrick Mahomes are expected to join, turning the trip into more of a laid-back getaway than a headline-grabbing event.That “chill trip” detail stands out. It reflects someone who is not chasing the noise anymore. Kelce has had years of high-pressure games and constant attention. Now, he seems to be choosing calm, and that shift feels intentional.Swift’s recent appearance at the iHeartRadio Music Awards added even more emotion to the moment. Her 10-carat engagement ring finally made its red carpet debut, but it was what she said on stage that stuck.“I think that this album probably also feels very happy and confident and free because that's the way that I get to feel every single day of my life, because of my fiancé, who's here too,” she said, according to People.It did not sound rehearsed. It sounded real.Their engagement reveal last year carried that same energy. With the caption, “Your English teacher and your gym teacher are getting married 🧨,” they showed a mix of humor and heart that fans instantly connected with.Now, as the wedding gets closer, nothing about their approach feels forced. A quiet trip, meaningful moments, and a focus on the people who matter most. It is not flashy. It is not over the top. But it feels genuine, and that might be what makes it stand out the most.
Article Summary: Travis Kelce is reportedly planning a relaxed bachelor party in the Bahamas with close friends, including Jason Kelce and Patrick Mahomes. Meanwhile, Taylor Swift continues celebrating their engagement publicly. The couple is keeping things simple, focusing on meaningful experiences as their wedding approaches.

Article Title: NFL Trade Rumors: Dallas Cowboys and Kansas City Chiefs linked in bold first-round draft shake-up
Article Text:
The Dallas Cowboys are considering a proposed draft trade with the Kansas City Chiefs that would move them from pick No. 20 to No. 29 while gaining extra mid-round selections. The idea boosts depth, especially on defense, but risks missing elite talent. Dallas must decide between immediate impact players or building roster depth.

Cowboys face risk-reward dilemma with trade-down strategy

The Dallas Cowboys are heading into the 2026 NFL Draft with unusual flexibility, and that alone has stirred debate around what their front office might do next. Two first-round picks give them options, but also pressure. With clear gaps on defense, every decision feels amplified. The question is simple but loaded. Should Dallas chase elite talent early or gamble on depth by moving down the board?That debate intensified after a proposed deal with the Kansas City Chiefs surfaced, suggesting Dallas could slide back from No. 20 to No. 29. On paper, it looks like a classic quantity-over-quality move. In reality, it could shape how quickly this roster turns things around.The suggested trade offers Dallas additional mid-round assets, including a valuable third-round pick, while still keeping two first-round selections. That kind of flexibility has appeal, especially for a team trying to rebuild key defensive positions. However, sliding nine spots in the first round is not a small drop. It could mean missing out on a cornerstone player.As noted in the proposal, “The Cowboys have eight selections, including those two first-rounders, but none between Nos.20 and 92 overall, which is the supposed heart of this draft class, especially attheir positions of need.”That insight cuts to the core of Dallas’ dilemma. The middle of this draft is rich with talent, particularly on defense. Adding picks in that range could help fill multiple holes at cornerback, edge rusher, and linebacker.Still, the logic is not without pushback. “Dallas has taken on more of an apparent trade-down mentality in recent years, and because the Cowboys' biggest aim should arguably be scooping up as much defensive talent as possible, moving back would have real merit,” Edholm added. “After all the picks are swapped, Dallas would have five in the top 112 overall. Use four or more of those on defense and kickstart the rebuild. ”That sounds appealing, but it hinges on one risky assumption. That elite talent will still be available at No. 29.For a team that needs immediate impact players, standing firm at No. 20 might offer a safer path. Draft boards can shift quickly, and difference-makers rarely fall far. Dallas must decide whether it values volume or star power more.In a draft filled with uncertainty, this choice could define their season before it even begins.
Article Summary: The Cowboys have two first-round picks in the 2026 NFL Draft. A proposed trade with the Kansas City Chiefs would move them from No. 20 to No. 29. The idea boosts depth, especially on defense, but risks missing elite talent. Dallas must decide between immediate impact players or building roster depth.

Article Title: Hailee Steinfeld gets real about mental health struggles while expecting first child with Josh Allen
Article Text:
In December 2025, Hailee Steinfeld opened up about struggling with anxiety during pregnancy while balancing her career and relationship with Josh Allen. She described how overwhelming it felt and shared simple coping methods like taking breaks, journaling, and stepping away from stress, highlighting a raw and honest side of mental health.

Hailee Steinfeld opens up about anxiety during pregnancy in 2025

From the outside, life in the spotlight can look effortless. But in December 2025, Hailee Steinfeld shared a much more honest version of her reality. During her pregnancy, she found herself dealing with anxiety in a way she had never experienced before. It was not something distant or manageable. It felt close, real, and sometimes too much to handle. She chose to talk about it in a way that felt real and unfiltered instead of hiding it.The timing made what she said even more powerful. She was balancing a demanding career while also navigating her relationship with Josh Allen . On the surface, everything looked steady. But behind that, she was trying to understand what her mind and body were going through, one day at a time.Looking back at her reflections from May 2025, Hailee admitted she had never fully understood anxiety until it affected her personally. It was not just a feeling you could brush aside. It showed up physically and lingered longer than expected. She also spoke about how casually the word anxiety gets used, something she has always felt uncomfortable with.By October, things reached a point where she needed immediate support.She shared how she ended up in a late-night therapy session, not because she planned it, but because she needed it. That moment said a lot without needing extra explanation.Then, in December 2025, she announced her pregnancy, with her baby due in mid-2026. It was a joyful update, but it came with its own emotional layers. Rather than trying to control everything, she leaned into small, simple ways to cope.“I take a step away from whatever is making me feel that way, sit, and do nothing. You can curl up with your favourite blanket and not talk to anyone for ten minutes. Take a gentle pause”.Her approach was gentle. She wrote things down. She gave herself short breaks with music. She stepped outside for fresh air. At one point, she even logged off social media to create some quiet for herself.There is something comforting in the way she talks about it all. No big solutions. No perfect answers. Just small steps that help her get through the day. And maybe that is what makes her story stay with people. It feels honest, and it feels human.
Article Summary: In December 2025, Hailee Steinfeld opened up about struggling with anxiety during pregnancy. She described how overwhelming it felt and shared simple coping methods like taking breaks, journaling, and stepping away from stress. She chose to talk about it in a way that felt real and unfiltered instead of hiding it.

Article Title: Chiefs QB Patrick Mahomes leaves wife Brittany Mahomes emotional in latest update
Article Text:
Brittany Mahomes shared a childhood photo of Patrick Mahomes that reminded her of their youngest daughter, creating an emotional family moment. The post came shortly after her Hall of Fame honor. As Patrick continues recovering from injury, the glimpse into their life with three children highlighted a softer, personal side beyond football and fame.

Brittany Mahomes gets emotional over Patrick Mahomes throwback as family moment melts hearts

Some of the most meaningful moments in sports do not happen on the field. This week, Patrick Mahomes reminded fans of that without even trying. As the Kansas City Chiefs star continues working his way back from injury, it was a simple childhood photo, shared by his wife Brittany Mahomes, that quietly stole the spotlight and touched hearts online.The moment felt personal. Fresh off celebrating her own milestone, Brittany turned her attention to family, offering a glimpse into a side of Mahomes that fans rarely see. No game highlights. No headlines about wins or losses. Just a memory, and the emotion that came with it.Brittany Mahomes has had plenty to celebrate lately. Her induction into the University of Texas at Tyler Athletics Hall of Fame was not just an award. It was recognition of years of hard work, discipline, and a standout college soccer career that left a lasting mark.Still, it was a quiet Instagram post that truly connected with people. Brittany shared a throwback photo of Patrick Mahomes as a toddler, dressed head to toe in Minnesota Twins gear. The image was adorable, but what caught her attention most was something deeper. She saw their youngest daughter in him.“Goldens twin 🥹 @patrickmahomes,” she wrote.It was a small line, but it said everything.For Brittany, it was not just about how cute the photo was. It was about seeing her family reflected in the past, about noticing how life has come full circle.Today, the couple is raising three children, Sterling, Bronze, and little Golden. Their lives move fast, filled with travel, football, and public attention. Yet moments like this slow everything down.. They bring focus back to what really matters.Meanwhile, Patrick Mahomes continues his rehab, putting in the work to be ready for the upcoming season. The grind is intense, and expectations remain high. But behind all that, there is this side of him too. A father. A husband. Someone whose story did not start in packed stadiums, but in small, ordinary moments like the one Brittany shared.And maybe that is why the post resonated. It felt real. Not polished. Not staged. Just a reminder that even the biggest stars have roots, memories, and moments that look a lot like everyone else’s.
Article Summary: Brittany Mahomes shared a childhood photo of Patrick Mahomes that reminded her of their youngest daughter. The post came shortly after her Hall of Fame honor. The glimpse into their life with three children highlighted a softer, personal side beyond football and fame.

Article Title: Coachella 2026: Fact check: Is Taylor Swift stepping in to replace Sabrina Carpenter at Coachella 2026 amid health issues ahead of her wedding to Travis Kelce?
Article Text:
Is Taylor Swift stepping in to replace Sabrina Carpenter at Coachella 2026 amid health issues ahead of her wedding to Travis Kelce?(Image via Getty Images)

Has Taylor Swift replaced Sabrina Carpenter at Coachella 2026, ahead of her wedding to Travis Kelce?



Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce did attend Coachella in 2024



Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce have stayed away from the spotlight after their joint appearance at a recent awards show.While this has convinced many that they are fully focused on planning their lavish wedding, rumors about Taylor Swift filling in for Sabrina Carpenter at Coachella 2026 have sparked chaos.With the Coachella 2026 being just a few days away, recently rumors about Sabrina Carpenter backing out of the event, citing health issued sparked panic.This led many to believe that Taylor Swift will be stepping in to perform at Coachella 2026 for the first time in her career of 20 years.No, the rumors are entirely false. The popular pop star, Sabrina Carpenter, has made no statements about backing out of Coachella 2026 because of any health issue she is facing.The billionaire pop star has never performed in Coachella and it seems, she has no intentions of doing so in the near future.The primary reason for this being how Taylor Swift has consistently avoided performing at events, including Super Bowl, considering, how her performances include massive production and are pretty elaborate.Both Taylor Swift and Sabrina Carpenter have stayed away from commenting on the speculations.The last time Taylor Swift was actually spotted in Coachella was in 2024 as she walked hand in hand with Travis Kelce, who was fresh off a Super Bowl win for the Kansas City Chiefs.Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce were seen dancing together at Coachella 2024 as they were even spotted sharing a heartfelt kiss.However, that was the last time that the billionaire pop star was spotted at Coachella, as both she and Travis Kelce avoided last year’s event.At this point in time, both Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce seem to be fully focused on planning their lavish wedding.As the two made their joint appearance at a recent awards show, it has convinced fans that the two are getting married soon.Taylor Swift even credited her soon to be husband Travis Kelce for changing her life as she said, “I think that this album probably also feels very happy and confident and free because that's the way that I get to feel every single day of my life, because of my fiancé, who’s here too.”While many reports confirm 13th June as their wedding date, Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce have stayed away from the speculations.
Article Summary: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce have stayed away from the spotlight after their joint appearance at a recent awards show. This has convinced many that they are fully focused on planning their lavish wedding. Rumors about Taylor Swift filling in for Sabrina Carpenter at Coachella 2026 have sparked chaos.

Article Title: Indianapolis Colts: NFL Trade Rumors: Indianapolis Colts break silence on $33M QB trade speculation as insider flags weak interest
Article Text:
Indianapolis Colts break silence on $33M QB trade speculation as insider flags weak interest.(Image via Getty Images)

Indianapolis Colts opens up about Anthony Richardson Sr.’s trade situation as NFL insider drops a shocking update on it



The Indianapolis Colts had a pretty interesting season after it started off with a dominating performance on the field.As expectations increased, the Indianapolis Colts failed to perform and ended the season with nine losses and eight wins. As the team focuses on working on their roster, the Indianapolis Colts have opened up about trading their popular quarterback.A few hours ago, the Indianapolis Colts’ general manager Chris Ballad opened up about trading their star quarterback, Anthony Richardson Sr., as he said, “We’ll see how it works out here over time…We’ve had some discussions with teams.”Chris Ballad added, “Nothing’s come to fruition at this point. I’m proud of his development, his growth. He’s had some bad freaking luck…We’ll see here over the next month how that ends up working out with Anthony.”While Anthony Richardson Sr. has maintained his silence, popular NFL insider ESPN’s Adam Schefter has painted a different picture about the quarterback’s potential trade.A few days back, ESPN’s Adam Schefter appeared on The Pat McAfee Show, where he said, “The market for him was soft…If there was a market for him, they would've traded him, and it didn't materialize."As per ESPN’s Adam Schefter, the Indianapolis Colts have not received strong interest in Anthony Richardson Sr. from any of the teams in the league.He added, “There has not been a team that has been overly interested in getting a deal done. I know Green Bay was out there, but there was no real conversation. Maybe that'll happen and heat back up with the draft, but nothing so far."Neither the Indianapolis Colts nor Anthony Richardson Sr. has responded to ESPN’s Adam Schefter’s comments on his potential trade.Over the last few seasons, Anthony Richardson Sr. has had a string of tough luck events happening in his life.After his temporary benching in 2024, many expected Anthony Richardson Sr. to bounce back on the field in the last season.But Anthony Richardson Sr. sustained a freak accident during a pregame warmup in October 2025. This left him with a fractured orbital bone and an eye injury.The Indianapolis Colts’ star player played just five snaps in the last season and ended the season on injured reserve.For now, all eyes are on Anthony Richardson Sr. as many expect him to bounce back in the upcoming season.
Article Summary: The Indianapolis Colts have opened up about trading their star quarterback, Anthony Richardson Sr. General manager Chris Ballad said, "We’ll see how it works out here over time" NFL insider Adam Schefter has painted a different picture about the quarterback’s potential trade. Schefter said that the Colts have not received strong interest in Anthony Richardson Jr. from other teams.

Article Title: Joe Alwyn: "She can’t handle anyone with feelings": Taylor Swift’s love life under scrutiny as viral rant drags Joe Alwyn and Travis Kelce
Article Text:
A viral post targeting Taylor Swift has sparked intense debate online, criticizing her past relationship with Joe Alwyn and taking a swipe at her current romance with Travis Kelce. The harsh commentary questions her empathy and songwriting choices, dividing fans. While some defend her artistic expression, others see it as controversial, reigniting scrutiny around her personal life.

Viral post sparks debate over Taylor Swift’s relationships and lyrics

The internet doesn't wait for context. It reacts, it grows, and sometimes it turns one person's opinion into a full-blown cultural debate overnight. A sharply worded post about Taylor Swift that went viral did just that. It brought up her past relationship with Joe Alwyn and made fun of her current one with Travis Kelce . The tone was harsh and unrepentant, and it quickly divided people into those who were angry and those who agreed.Not only did the criticism bother a lot of readers, but the deeper accusation behind it did too. The post said that Swift's songs might show that she doesn't care about her partners' emotional problems. For an artist known for turning heartbreak into poetry, that claim hit a nerve and sparked intense discussion online.The now widely shared post read:“No wonder Taylor called Justin Baldoni a bitch…Taylor Swift thinks male sadness is annoying and men suffering from depression are a real drag.Here’s a longtime ex that Taylor Swift publicly belittled for no reason.London actor Joe Alwyn never said a word about her publicly and values his privacy.So of course Taylor dragged him through the mud in her song “So Long, London” and belittled his battles with clinical depression.Notice how this spoiled narc doesn’t feel a bit of genuine concern for Joe’s struggles only irritation at the burden she felt his deep sadness placed on HER. How dare he what a downer!Sweetheart, I know it must be so hard to have your shallow, self-centered, bubble-gum teenage view of the world infringed on by your depressive boyfriend. What a drag… 🤔No wonder Tay-tay had to end up with a loose-grinning, fuzzy-brained oaf like Travis Kelce. She can’t handle anyone with feelings that don’t fit onto a friendship bracelet. 🤪🤮Apparently this “feminist” has no patience for male pain.”The language is blunt, even uncomfortable at times. Still, it has opened the door to a wider conversation. Some listeners believe “So Long, London” reflects emotional exhaustion rather than cruelty. Others feel it exposes private struggles that should have stayed out of the spotlight.Then there is Travis Kelce. His relationship with Swift feels very different. It is open, expressive, and often playful. From public appearances to visible support at each other’s events, the two seem to embrace a shared spotlight that Swift once avoided. For some, that signals growth. For others, it raises questions about what she now seeks in a partner.In the end, people still see Taylor Swift as a person. People can interpret her music, and her relationships are open to criticism. That mix keeps her in the middle of talks like this, whether she talks back or not.
Article Summary: Viral post sparks debate over Taylor Swift’s relationships and lyrics. The post said that Swift's songs might show that she doesn't care about her partners' emotional problems. For an artist known for turning heartbreak into poetry, that claim hit a nerve and sparked intense discussion.

Article Title: Ja Morant’s teammate faces serious trouble as police booked the Memphis Grizzlies forward in Arkansas
Article Text:
Brandon Clarke. Image via: NBA.com

Ja Morant’s teammate Brandon Clarke arrested in Arkansas



Brandon Clarke's injury update



Ja Morant’s teammate, Brandon Clarke, has landed in unexpected trouble, with the Memphis Grizzlies forward arrested in Arkansas on Wednesday. The development adds an off-court concern for Memphis at a time when the team is already navigating a challenging stretch late in the season.Clarke has barely featured this year due to injuries, and just as his recovery remained uncertain, this situation surfaced. It shifts attention away from his rehab and onto legal questions that now surround his immediate future.According to records from the Cross County Sheriff’s Department, Clarke was booked on Wednesday afternoon on multiple charges. These include speeding, improper passing, fleeing, possession of a controlled substance, and trafficking a controlled substance. A booking photo was also released as part of the report.Details remain limited, and it is still unclear how the situation will unfold. Memphis head coach Tuomas Iisalo kept his response brief before the team’s game against New York, saying, “I'm aware of the report, but don't have any comments.”For Clarke, this marks a difficult turn in what has already been a disrupted season. The 29-year-old has spent his entire NBA career with Memphis since being drafted in 2019 and has been a steady presence when healthy.This incident, however, puts that stability into question.Even before the arrest, Clarke’s season had effectively come to an early end. Injuries have limited him to just two appearances, where he averaged modest numbers while trying to regain rhythm. A right knee issue delayed his start, and just as he returned briefly in December, a calf strain forced him back to the sidelines.The Grizzlies confirmed on March 24 that Clarke would miss the remainder of the season. Medical evaluations showed he needed more time before returning to what the team described as “high-intensity court work.” That decision closed the door on any late-season comeback.It has been a frustrating stretch for a player who once brought energy and consistency off the bench. Over the past few years, injuries have repeatedly interrupted his progress, including a serious Achilles setback in 2023.Now, instead of focusing solely on recovery and a fresh start next season, Clarke faces a different kind of challenge. Memphis, meanwhile, continues to push forward, hoping to stay competitive while one of its longest-tenured players deals with issues far removed from the court.
Article Summary: Memphis Grizzlies forward Brandon Clarke was arrested in Arkansas on Wednesday. He was charged with speeding, improper passing, fleeing, possession of a controlled substance, and trafficking. Clarke has barely featured this year due to injuries, and just as his recovery remained uncertain, this situation surfaced.

Article Title: Stephen Curry and wife Ayesha Curry join hands with $150 billion-rich mogul in a heartwarming move
Article Text:
Stephen Curry and Ayesha Curry. Image via: Leon Bennett/ Getty Images

Steph Curry and his wife, Ayesha Curry, team up with Warren Buffett



Stephen Curry and Ayesha Curry. Image via: Getty Images

What is Steph Curry and wife Ayesha Curry's partnership with Warren Buffett about?



Warren Buffett. Image via: Johannes Eisele /AFP / Getty Images

Stephen Curry and Ayesha Curry are stepping into something different from basketball this offseason. Their latest move connects them with one of the most influential figures in finance. The move signals a shared purpose that goes beyond fame, business, or sport. It is about impact, and it is rooted in communities that need it most.As the $150 billion-rich mogul, Warren Buffett reintroduces one of his most iconic charity initiatives, the Currys are on board. Together, they are turning a well-known philanthropic tradition into something that feels new again. Of course, Stephen is one of the most popular and highly celebrated NBA stars right now, and Ayesha has built her own legacy in different ventures, including entrepreneurship and acting.After a four-year pause, Warren Buffett is reviving his famous charity lunch, but this time the format carries a different kind of star power. The 95-year-old Berkshire Hathaway chairman has partnered with Stephen and Ayesha Curry to launch an auction titled “A Seat At The Table,” combining financial clout with cultural relevance.“Over the years, I’ve seen how the business community and innovative nonprofits can work together to create real change, and I’ve always believed in supporting organizations that are making a meaningful difference,” Buffett said in a statement.“This event is about coming together again, in a new way, with people I admire, to support work that truly matters. Partnering with Stephen and Ayesha to help launch something new in support of these communities is something I’m very happy to be part of. ”Online bidding opens May 7 and runs through May 14 on eBay. The winning bidder, along with up to seven guests, will sit down for a private lunch with Buffett and the Currys in Omaha on June 24. The stakes are high. Previous editions of this auction have raised more than $50 million, including a record-breaking $19 million bid in 2022.At its core, this partnership is about channeling influence into action. Proceeds from the auction will be split between the Glide Foundation in San Francisco and the Eat. Learn. Play. Foundation, which the Currys founded to support children in Oakland through education, nutrition, and physical activity.“For us, this is about using the platform we've been given to create something bigger than ourselves,” the Currys said. “We've always believed that access can open doors, but what matters most is what you do with it. With this incredible auction, we are excited to turn this moment into real impact for students and families throughout the Bay Area community.”Glide has long been a lifeline for vulnerable populations, while the Currys’ foundation reflects their personal investment in their home community. Add Ayesha’s growing business presence through her Sweet July brand, and the collaboration begins to look less like a one-off event and more like a meeting of aligned visions.Buffett’s decision to bring the lunch back was influenced by the passing of Glide’s founder, Rev. Cecil Williams. His belief that the organization should endure seems to have found new guardians in this partnership.
Article Summary: Steph Curry and his wife, Ayesha Curry, team up with Warren Buffett. The move signals a shared purpose that goes beyond fame, business, or sport. The winning bidder, along with up to seven guests, will sit down for a private lunch with Buffett.

The team tried to manage his minutes at first, but later decided to sit him out.For this game, the injury report clearly lists him as out because of his ankle. There is no sign that he is close to returning. Fans should expect him to stay on the bench.Without Giannis Antetokounmpo, the Milwaukee Bucks lose their main player on both ends of the floor. He usually leads the team in scoring, rebounding, and playmaking. This season, he has been putting up around 34.2 points, 13.4 rebounds, and 7.2 assists.The team now has to adjust its lineup. The expected setup looks like this:• PG: Ryan Rollins, with Cole Anthony coming off the bench• SG: A.J. Green, with Gary Trent Jr. supporting• SF: Gary Trent Jr. taking more scoring responsibility• PF: Kyle Kuzma playing alongside Bobby Portis• C: Myles Turner handling the center rolePlayers like Cam Thomas and Taurean Prince will get more minutes. Kevin Porter Jr. is also part of the rotation, but he is dealing with a knee issue. Even with these changes, it is hard to replace what Giannis does.Here is the current Bucks roster:• Forwards: Giannis Antetokounmpo, Thanasis Antetokounmpo, Ousmane Dieng, Kyle Kuzma, Bobby Portis, Taurean Prince, Pete Nance, Alex Antetokounmpo• Guards: A.J. Green, Ryan Rollins, Gary Harris, Kevin Porter Jr., Andre Jackson Jr., Cam Thomas, Gary Trent Jr., Cormac Ryan• Centers: Myles Turner, Jericho SimsPlayers like Damian Lillard, Jrue Holiday, Khris Middleton, and Brook Lopez are no longer part of the team this season.The Houston Rockets come into this game in a strong position. They hold a 46-29 record and are fighting for a top spot in the Western Conference.Their main group includes:• Alperen Şengün at center• Jabari Smith Jr. at power forward• Jae’Sean Tate and Amen Thompson on the wings• Reed Sheppard and Josh Okogie in the backcourt, with Aaron Holiday in the rotationFred VanVleet and Steven Adams are out for the season. Still, most of the team is healthy, which gives them an advantage.The Milwaukee Bucks are 30-45 and are not in a good position in the Eastern Conference. Their chances of making a late push are very low.Because of that, the team is being careful with Giannis. He has already dealt with calf, knee, and ankle issues this season. The focus now is on his health, not short-term results.The team would rather give him time to recover than risk another injury.Giannis Antetokounmpo being out changes the game a lot:• The Bucks lose their main scoring option and inside presence• The Rockets get a clear edge, especially at home• Milwaukee relies more on guards and outside shootingPlayers like Rollins, Green, Trent Jr., Kuzma, and Thomas will take more shots. Still, the team is not the same without Giannis.Giannis Antetokounmpo is not playing against the Houston Rockets on April 1, 2026. He has been ruled out because of his ankle injury.Also read: Milwaukee Bucks vs Houston Rockets injury report: Who's playing, injured and questionable players, head-to-head records, team stats, and more (April 1, 2026) There is no late change expected. The Bucks will go into the game without him, while the Rockets have a stronger and healthier lineup.
Article Summary: Giannis Antetokounmpo will not play for the Milwaukee Bucks against the Houston Rockets on April 1, 2026. The team has ruled him out because of a left ankle injury. The game is still going ahead as planned, but the Bucks will be without their biggest star again. There is no sign that he is close to returning.
